description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult male pedestrian with a stylized, slightly exaggerated body form. The figure is dressed in a buttoned, double-breasted jacket with a high collar and matching trousers, giving a formal or uniformed appearance. The arms are extended outward in a dramatic V-shape, creating an unusual silhouette, and the hands are relaxed at the ends of the sleeves. The face is clean-shaven with short, neatly styled hair, and the figure wears sturdy, lace-up boots. The overall build is average, with realistic human proportions except for the extended arms. The clothing appears to be fitted and without visible accessories or carried items.
description: An adult male figure in a formal buttoned jacket and trousers, arms extended outward in a V-shape, wearing sturdy boots and short, neat hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, buttoned jacket, and both arms dramatically extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the side of the jacket, and the arm extended backward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, jacket, and both arms extended outward from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the side of the jacket, and the arm extended backward.
attribute_clothing_type: double-breasted formal jacket and matching trousers
attribute_posture: standing with arms extended outward in a V-shape
